name: testRequestToServer
description: Verify the request to server contains all the information from the filter
descriptionHtml: Verify the request to server contains all the information from the filter

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as '0602.142035.20.super@email.com'
Login with '0602.142035.20.super@email.com' user
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: Verify the request to server contains all the information from the filter

steps.name: Click on 'Transactions' menu in Header
Select '0602.142035. test request company' company using filter
Select '0602.142035. test request merchant' business unit using filter
Set start and end date: 01-05-2025 to 07-05-2025
Click Currency Selector
Select currency USD from dropdown menu
Select Card type 'VISA' from dropdown menu
Click 'Amount' button
Fill 'From' amount value
Fill 'To' amount value
Click 'Apply' amount button
Verify: merchant ID is sent to the server
Verify: dateFrom is sent to the server
Verify: dateTo is sent to the server
Verify: currency is sent to the server
Verify: paymentMethod is sent to the server
Verify:amountFrom is sent to the server
Verify: amountTo is sent to the server
